utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: all 5 appear. Check full specification: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs—provided with plan names and monthly costs plus summed cost. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs—provided with plan name and monthly cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs—provided with plan name and monthly cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs—the plan lists services but explicitly says none specified as separate cost; costs are not provided. Not fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—provided with monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific items by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health insurance (€100/month), LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health insurance (€65/month), LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home content insurance (€60/month), and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance (€50/month). Using the ground-truth ratings, these correspond to: primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 8), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 7).
